$comment: Structured-output schemas for the two judges in judges.md. Use these on API surfaces that support JSON-schema output (Anthropic output_config.format, OpenAI strict json_schema, Gemini responseSchema) so findings parse reliably instead of trusting the prose template. The prose templates in judges.md remain canonical for chat surfaces; a change to either format must update both (scripts/check-sync.py checks the invariant fields).

lens.description: The single rubric dimension this pass judged through

findings.description: Every defect at any severity and confidence; empty array is the strong claim that every rubric line in this lens was actively checked and nothing surfaced

rubric_line.description: The rubric line violated, or 'unverified: <line>' when the evidence could not establish it

checked.description: Rubric lines verified, each with how (file read, command run, screenshot opened)

not_checkable.description: Rubric lines outside this lens's scope

gate.description: fail if any finding would embarrass the work in front of an expert practitioner

fix_direction.description: Direction of the fix, one line; the gate never fixes

ranking.description: Candidate-ranking mode only; null in gate mode. Ordered best first.

grafts.description: Elements worth carrying into the winner (empty for the winner itself)

distill.description: Each taste judgment converted into a reusable rule candidate for the matching craft standard, or a gold-example note; empty when there are no findings and nothing deserves gold status
